description: Proposal 0034: first-class actor + per-actor allowlist enforcement (descriptor.policy.allowed_actors) at the invocation gate. The EFFECTIVE actor = the verified subject id when the subject is verified (accountability wins — an asserted actor cannot override a host-verified caller), else the asserted actor.id, else the subject id. A capability whose allowed_actors is non-empty denies (policy_blocked) any effective actor not in the list; an empty/absent list is open. All three reference impls agree on this decision.

cases.note: verified subject NOT in list -> denied
unverified subject, asserted actor in list -> allowed (actor.id used)
unverified subject, no actor, subject.id not in list -> denied
accountability wins: verified subject alice + asserted actor bob (a spoof attempt); bob is listed but the VERIFIED id alice is not -> denied
